summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke pair. Verdict: needs_revision. The wrapper is read-only and delegates locally as required, but it overstates success by requiring a fully successful delegate outcome with nonzero Excel output, and it can report failure even when the underlying best-effort evidence-backed contract is satisfied via partial/intermediate results. The delegate is generally aligned with batch/best-effort processing and emits evidence-backed reports, but the pair does not fully honor the stated contract to preserve reviewable intermediate outcomes without over-claiming or over-failing.
